_style_suffix: wide panoramic scene, no characters, no people, no figures, no animals, empty environment, post-apocalyptic theme, semi-realistic digital painting style, muted desaturated palette, atmospheric lighting, cinematic composition, detailed environment, high quality, no text, no border, no frame

shelter-interior.name: 避难所内部
shelter-interior.prompt: abandoned underground parking garage converted into a survivor shelter main hall, rusty iron doors, improvised beds made of salvaged materials, dim flickering fluorescent lights, a humming diesel generator in the corner, oil stains on concrete floor, cramped space with hundreds of survivors' belongings scattered around

shelter-perimeter.name: 避难所外围
shelter-perimeter.prompt: barbed wire fences and sandbag fortifications surrounding a shelter entrance, burned-out cars stacked as roadblocks, watchtowers with searchlights, distant ruined city skyline under gray overcast sky, scattered debris and empty shell casings on muddy ground

shelter-east-street.name: 避难区东街

west-wall.name: 西围墙

medical-station.name: 医疗站

water-station.name: 净水站
